title: Spectrum Cordless Complete Garden Maintenance Set - Special Summer Price
description_html:
Complete Cordless Garden Bundle

Upgrade your entire garden setup in one go with this powerful, fully cordless range. Designed to give you total freedom, consistent performance, and professional results, this bundle covers everything from mowing to trimming and clearing — all without cables, fuel, or hassle.

Self-Propelled Cordless Lawn Mower (SBS460CLM)

Take the effort out of mowing with a machine built for power, coverage, and comfort.

With its self-propelled drive, you’re not pushing — the mower does the hard work for you, making it ideal for medium to larger lawns. The wide 42cm durable metal cutting deck means fewer passes and faster results, while the brushless motor and dual battery system deliver consistent power from start to finish.

You also get full flexibility with 4 cutting modes (collect, mulch, side or rear discharge), so you can adapt to any lawn condition.

Benefit: Less effort, faster mowing, and a cleaner, more professional finish every time.

Cordless Hedge Trimmer (SBS560CHT)

Keep your hedges sharp, neat, and under control — without the strain.

This lightweight cordless trimmer is designed to give you clean, precise cuts with minimal effort, helping you maintain crisp edges and tidy borders. It’s ideal for regular garden maintenance without the noise and inconvenience of petrol tools.

Benefit: Faster trimming with smoother results and less fatigue.

Cordless Handy Mower (SBS220CHM)  

Perfect for the areas your main mower can’t reach.

Designed for tight spaces, edges, and awkward corners, this compact mower lets you finish the job properly — no missed patches or rough edges.

Benefit: Total lawn precision, even in hard-to-reach areas.

Cordless Pole Hedge Trimmer (SBS240CPHT)

With an overall machine length of 2.4m, this pole hedge trimmer provides excellent reach, making it perfect for taller hedges and awkward angles. The rotating cutting head, combined with a 180° adjustable trimming angle, gives you maximum flexibility to cut both horizontally and vertically with ease.

Powered by a dependable brush motor, the SBS460PHT delivers consistent cutting performance for everyday garden maintenance. The 460mm dual-action, laser-cut blade ensures clean and efficient trimming, while the 20mm cutting capacity allows you to handle thicker branches with confidence. With a blade speed of 2600 strokes per minute, you can achieve fast, smooth results every time.

 Cordless Leaf Blower Vacuum (SBS480CBV)

Clear, Collect & Tidy Your Garden In Minutes

This versatile tool lets you blow debris, vacuum leaves, and reduce waste all with one machine — making post-mow clean-up or autumn maintenance quick and easy.

Benefit: Less time cleaning up, more time enjoying your garden.

 Why This Bundle Works

  • Fully cordless freedom – no cables, no petrol, no restrictions
  • One battery system – power your entire range
  • Complete garden solution – mow, trim, edge, and clear
  • Serious value – everything you need for just £499.95

Instead of buying each tool separately, this bundle gives you a complete cordless ecosystem at a fraction of the cost — perfect for homeowners who want professional results without the professional price tag.

metafields.custom.feature_bullets:
• Self-propelled lawn mower – effortless mowing with a wide cut and pro-level finish
  • Hedge trimmer – clean, precise cutting for perfectly shaped hedges
  • Handy mower – ideal for edges, small areas, and tight spaces
  • Leaf blower vacuum – clear, collect, and tidy in minutes

metafields.custom.bullet_three: Handy mower – ideal for edges, small areas, and tight spaces
